## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Innerwell and GrowthX to discuss SEO strategy, website redesign, and content planning.](https://fathom.video/share/uVwHi7hzNzB7fMrsC3P-zYetDczea4B8?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Shifting from blog format to category pages for conditions, with a two-phase approach (V1: indexing existing articles, V2: full redesign)](https://fathom.video/share/uVwHi7hzNzB7fMrsC3P-zYetDczea4B8?tab=summary&timestamp=37.0)
  - [New blog post template in development, focusing on improved conversion rates](https://fathom.video/share/uVwHi7hzNzB7fMrsC3P-zYetDczea4B8?tab=summary&timestamp=333.0)
  - [Innerwell's current revenue split: 90% ketamine, 10% other services (EMDR, psychiatry, therapy)](https://fathom.video/share/uVwHi7hzNzB7fMrsC3P-zYetDczea4B8?tab=summary&timestamp=1146.0)
  - [Target CAC of $300; need to model conversion rates and traffic requirements to achieve this goal](https://fathom.video/share/uVwHi7hzNzB7fMrsC3P-zYetDczea4B8?tab=summary&timestamp=965.0)

## Topics

### SEO and Website Structure Updates

  - [Dave created a list of page types from crawl data](https://fathom.video/share/uVwHi7hzNzB7fMrsC3P-zYetDczea4B8?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [Homepage missing H1 tag, added to fix list](https://fathom.video/share/uVwHi7hzNzB7fMrsC3P-zYetDczea4B8?tab=summary&timestamp=434.0)
  - [Discussion on how to communicate changes to Philip (Innerwell team)](https://fathom.video/share/uVwHi7hzNzB7fMrsC3P-zYetDczea4B8?tab=summary&timestamp=51.0)
  - [Innerwell team will prioritize tasks weekly (Thursdays) for sprint planning](https://fathom.video/share/uVwHi7hzNzB7fMrsC3P-zYetDczea4B8?tab=summary&timestamp=82.0)

### Category Pages and Content Strategy

  - [Transition from blog format to category pages for conditions](https://fathom.video/share/uVwHi7hzNzB7fMrsC3P-zYetDczea4B8?tab=summary&timestamp=108.0)
  - [GrowthX team presented initial design mockup based on Helpline's structure](https://fathom.video/share/uVwHi7hzNzB7fMrsC3P-zYetDczea4B8?tab=summary&timestamp=192.0)
  - [Two-phase approach:](https://fathom.video/share/uVwHi7hzNzB7fMrsC3P-zYetDczea4B8?tab=summary&timestamp=333.0)
      - [V1: Index existing articles, create basic category pages](https://fathom.video/share/uVwHi7hzNzB7fMrsC3P-zYetDczea4B8?tab=summary&timestamp=347.0)
      - [V2: Full redesign with more advanced features](https://fathom.video/share/uVwHi7hzNzB7fMrsC3P-zYetDczea4B8?tab=summary&timestamp=354.0)
  - [Need to prioritize content creation for each condition hub](https://fathom.video/share/uVwHi7hzNzB7fMrsC3P-zYetDczea4B8?tab=summary&timestamp=371.0)
  - [Maintain blog section for content not fitting into condition hubs](https://fathom.video/share/uVwHi7hzNzB7fMrsC3P-zYetDczea4B8?tab=summary&timestamp=449.0)

### New Blog Post Template

  - [Innerwell shared new blog post template design (link in Slack)](https://fathom.video/share/uVwHi7hzNzB7fMrsC3P-zYetDczea4B8?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)
  - [Features include:](https://fathom.video/share/uVwHi7hzNzB7fMrsC3P-zYetDczea4B8?tab=summary&timestamp=693.0)
      - [Cleaner layout](https://fathom.video/share/uVwHi7hzNzB7fMrsC3P-zYetDczea4B8?tab=summary&timestamp=693.0)
      - [Persistent CTA](https://fathom.video/share/uVwHi7hzNzB7fMrsC3P-zYetDczea4B8?tab=summary&timestamp=697.0)
      - [Related content section](https://fathom.video/share/uVwHi7hzNzB7fMrsC3P-zYetDczea4B8?tab=summary&timestamp=706.0)
  - [GrowthX team to review and provide feedback within a week](https://fathom.video/share/uVwHi7hzNzB7fMrsC3P-zYetDczea4B8?tab=summary&timestamp=784.0)

### Content and Data Sources

  - [Innerwell can provide unique patient outcome data by condition](https://fathom.video/share/uVwHi7hzNzB7fMrsC3P-zYetDczea4B8?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
  - [Possibility of including quotes from specialized therapists](https://fathom.video/share/uVwHi7hzNzB7fMrsC3P-zYetDczea4B8?tab=summary&timestamp=585.0)
  - [Limited scalable proprietary data available beyond outcomes](https://fathom.video/share/uVwHi7hzNzB7fMrsC3P-zYetDczea4B8?tab=summary&timestamp=612.0)

### Metrics and Goals

  - [Target CAC: $300](https://fathom.video/share/uVwHi7hzNzB7fMrsC3P-zYetDczea4B8?tab=summary&timestamp=965.0)
  - [Current conversion rates:](https://fathom.video/share/uVwHi7hzNzB7fMrsC3P-zYetDczea4B8?tab=summary&timestamp=993.0)
      - [Local landing pages: \~0.7% from organic search](https://fathom.video/share/uVwHi7hzNzB7fMrsC3P-zYetDczea4B8?tab=summary&timestamp=993.0)
  - [Need to model conversion rates for different content types](https://fathom.video/share/uVwHi7hzNzB7fMrsC3P-zYetDczea4B8?tab=summary&timestamp=1017.0)
  - [Calculate required traffic to achieve target CAC](https://fathom.video/share/uVwHi7hzNzB7fMrsC3P-zYetDczea4B8?tab=summary&timestamp=1063.0)

### Business Evolution and Priorities

  - [Current revenue split: 90% ketamine, 10% other services](https://fathom.video/share/uVwHi7hzNzB7fMrsC3P-zYetDczea4B8?tab=summary&timestamp=1146.0)
  - [June patient numbers: 476 ketamine, 27 therapy, 12 EMDR, 11 psychiatry](https://fathom.video/share/uVwHi7hzNzB7fMrsC3P-zYetDczea4B8?tab=summary&timestamp=1163.0)
  - [Year-end goal: ketamine at 60%, increased share for other services](https://fathom.video/share/uVwHi7hzNzB7fMrsC3P-zYetDczea4B8?tab=summary&timestamp=1224.0)
  - [Potential growth in ketamine for pain management](https://fathom.video/share/uVwHi7hzNzB7fMrsC3P-zYetDczea4B8?tab=summary&timestamp=1236.0)
  - [All service areas considered growth opportunities](https://fathom.video/share/uVwHi7hzNzB7fMrsC3P-zYetDczea4B8?tab=summary&timestamp=1292.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Dave to send website breakdown to Philip for review](https://fathom.video/share/uVwHi7hzNzB7fMrsC3P-zYetDczea4B8?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [GrowthX team to provide detailed feedback on new blog post template](https://fathom.video/share/uVwHi7hzNzB7fMrsC3P-zYetDczea4B8?tab=summary&timestamp=784.0)
  - [Develop alignment on category vs. blog structure shift](https://fathom.video/share/uVwHi7hzNzB7fMrsC3P-zYetDczea4B8?tab=summary&timestamp=108.0)
  - [Start publishing content using the new format for ready articles](https://fathom.video/share/uVwHi7hzNzB7fMrsC3P-zYetDczea4B8?tab=summary&timestamp=1376.0)
  - [GrowthX to deliver projections on impact and measurement metrics next week](https://fathom.video/share/uVwHi7hzNzB7fMrsC3P-zYetDczea4B8?tab=summary&timestamp=1321.0)
  - [Model conversion rates and traffic requirements to achieve $300 CAC goal](https://fathom.video/share/uVwHi7hzNzB7fMrsC3P-zYetDczea4B8?tab=summary&timestamp=965.0)
